name: Tsumuha-Kutsunagi the Lord of Swords
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>刀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>トウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>都牟羽沓薙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ツムハクツナギ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. You can Tribute Summon this card by Tributing 1 Normal Summoned/Set monster. If this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up: Activate this effect; your opponent can send any number of cards from their field to the GY, then each player draws the same number of cards as were sent to the GY by this effect. During the End Phase of the turn this effect was activated, shuffle all cards into the Deck from the field, the GYs, and that are banished. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card on the field was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand.

action: Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
Returns banished cards to the Deck
Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Returns itself from field to hand
